name: PFIZER INC
summary: Pfizer Inc. is a global biopharmaceutical company that discovers, develops, manufactures, and commercializes medicines and vaccines. Key products include Comirnaty (COVID-19 vaccine), Paxlovid (COVID-19 oral treatment), Prevnar family (pneumococcal vaccines), Vyndaqel family (transthyretin amyloid cardiomyopathy), and oncology products including antibody-drug conjugates acquired through Seagen. Pfizer operates across developed and emerging markets worldwide, with commercial operations spanning internal and alliance-based product portfolios.
